evidence: Devices without ALAC codec get NAME_NOT_FOUND from MediaCodec
FFmpegService now has auto-download fallback with GitHub mirrors
APK built and copied to publish-apk
No external binary needed at build time
resolution: Hybrid approach: MediaCodec first (hardware accelerated), then auto-download FFmpeg binary via GitHub mirrors on first use, then FFmpeg transcoding. User's phone VPN should allow the in-app download.
